calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: S.Vantree, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Crisostomo Ibarra, Esq., present on his own behalf.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Elena Dening.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $37,247.63
Pre-Judgment Interest: $7,520.96
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $615.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $45,383.59
Judgment signed in open court.
